message:
Command `echo "=== LibreLane thread states ==="
for tid in $(ls /proc/214817/task/ 2>/dev/null); do
  WCHAN=$(cat /proc/214817/task/$tid/wchan 2>/dev/null)
  STAT=$(cat /proc/214817/task/$tid/status 2>/dev/null | grep "^State:" | awk '{print $2, $3}')
  echo "  Thread $tid: state=$STAT wchan=$WCHAN"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Check if librelane wrapper_run.log is still being written to ==="
MAIN_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"
stat "$MAIN_LOG" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "Size|Modify"

echo ""
echo "=== Pipe info for pipe:745653 ==="
# Check if pipe:745653 has data waiting 
# Find both endpoints of the pipe
for pid in 214817 216314; do
  echo "PID $pid pipe fds:"
  ls -la /proc/$pid/fd 2>/dev/null | grep "745653"
done` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "echo "=== LibreLane thread states ==="
for tid in $(ls /proc/214817/task/ 2>/dev/null); do
  WCHAN=$(cat /proc/214817/task/$tid/wchan 2>/dev/null)
  STAT=$(cat /proc/214817/task/$tid/status 2>/dev/null | grep "^State:" | awk '{print $2, $3}')
  echo "  Thread $tid: state=$STAT wchan=$WCHAN"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Check if librelane wrapper_run.log is still being written to ==="
MAIN_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"
stat "$MAIN_LOG" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "Size|Modify"

echo ""
echo "=== Pipe info for pipe:745653 ==="
# Check if pipe:745653 has data waiting 
# Find both endpoints of the pipe
for pid in 214817 216314; do
  echo "PID $pid pipe fds:"
  ls -la /proc/$pid/fd 2>/dev/null | grep "745653"
done", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== LibreLane thread states ===
  Thread 214817: state=S (sleeping) wchan=futex_wait_queue
  Thread 216315: state=S (sleeping) wchan=hrtimer_nanosleep

=== Check if librelane wrapper_run.log is still being written to ===
  Size: 4449039   	Blocks: 8696       IO Block: 4096   regular file
Modify: 2026-05-29 10:08:51.756769964 +0400

=== Pipe info for pipe:745653 ===
PID 214817 pipe fds:
lr-x------ 1 user user 64 May 29 10:07 11 -> pipe:[745653]
PID 216314 pipe fds:
l-wx------ 1 user user 64 May 29 10:08 1 -> pipe:[745653]
l-wx------ 1 user user 64 May 29 10:08 2 -> pipe:[745653]

extras.command:
echo "=== LibreLane thread states ==="
for tid in $(ls /proc/214817/task/ 2>/dev/null); do
  WCHAN=$(cat /proc/214817/task/$tid/wchan 2>/dev/null)
  STAT=$(cat /proc/214817/task/$tid/status 2>/dev/null | grep "^State:" | awk '{print $2, $3}')
  echo "  Thread $tid: state=$STAT wchan=$WCHAN"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Check if librelane wrapper_run.log is still being written to ==="
MAIN_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"
stat "$MAIN_LOG" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "Size|Modify"

echo ""
echo "=== Pipe info for pipe:745653 ==="
# Check if pipe:745653 has data waiting 
# Find both endpoints of the pipe
for pid in 214817 216314; do
  echo "PID $pid pipe fds:"
  ls -la /proc/$pid/fd 2>/dev/null | grep "745653"
done
